tracks.meaning: a piece of paper, sticker, or tag attached to something to identify, classify, or provide information about it
a metadata marker or tag used to categorize, organize, or identify digital content, files, or data
to attach a label to something; to mark or tag an object with identifying information
a company or brand that produces or markets goods, especially in music, fashion, or entertainment
to officially designate or classify something under a specific legal or regulatory category
to assign a name or category to a person or group, often in a way that influences perception or identity
a printed or written mark on a container, package, or surface indicating contents, instructions, or branding
